scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: npx --yes pnpm run typecheck && npx --yes pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: npx --yes pnpm run typecheck:libs && npx --yes pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
